title_en: Introduction to A Day and a Night in the House of the Messenger of Allah
title_ar: مقدمة: يوم وليلة في بيت رسول الله
content_en:
A detailed account of the daily and nightly routine of the Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him) as recorded in authenticated hadith, compiled by Ibn al-Qayyim al-Jawziyyah. This work reconstructs an ordinary day in the Prophet's life: his rising at night for prayer, his morning dhikr, his meals, his interactions with his family and companions, his midday rest, his prayers, and his bedtime routine.

Every detail is sourced from the hadith literature, providing an intimate and authentic portrait of the Prophet's blessed daily life. Readers gain a concrete picture of the Sunnah as lived practice: not just the formal acts of worship, but the manner of eating, greeting, speaking, resting, and relating to others that constitutes the complete prophetic model.

Following the Prophet's daily routine is itself an act of worship — the Prophet said: "Whoever revives a Sunnah of mine that has died after me, for him is the reward equivalent to those who act upon it." This work serves as a practical guide for Muslims who wish to structure their day according to the prophetic example.
title_id: Pengantar: Sehari Semalam di Rumah Rasulullah
content_id:
Catatan terperinci tentang rutinitas harian dan malam Nabi Muhammad ﷺ sebagaimana tercatat dalam hadis-hadis sahih, yang dikumpulkan oleh Ibnul Qayyim al-Jauziyyah. Karya ini merekonstruksi sehari biasa dalam kehidupan Nabi: bangun di malam hari untuk shalat, dzikir di pagi hari, makan, interaksi dengan keluarga dan para sahabat, istirahat siang hari, shalat, dan rutinitas sebelum tidur.

Setiap detail bersumber dari literatur hadis, memberikan gambaran yang intim dan autentik tentang kehidupan harian Nabi yang diberkahi. Pembaca mendapatkan gambaran nyata tentang Sunnah sebagai praktik kehidupan: bukan hanya ibadah formal, tetapi cara makan, memberi salam, berbicara, beristirahat, dan berinteraksi dengan orang lain yang membentuk model kenabian yang sempurna.

Mengikuti rutinitas harian Nabi itu sendiri merupakan ibadah — Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa menghidupkan sunnahku yang telah mati setelahku, maka baginya pahala seperti pahala orang-orang yang mengamalkannya." Karya ini berfungsi sebagai panduan praktis bagi umat Islam yang ingin mengatur hari mereka sesuai dengan teladan kenabian.
